histogram.name: Profile.AddNewUser
histogram.summary: The frequency of ways that new user profiles are added.

histogram.name: Profile.AllAccounts.Categories
histogram.summary: Classification of what account categories out of {consumer, enterprise} appear or appeared in this profile since the last time gaia cookies got deleted. Thus, this also includes signed-out accounts. If both categories appeared, it also distinguishes whether sync is enabled and for which of them. Recorded on every activation of a Chrome window (for the respective profile).

histogram.name: Profile.AllAccounts.Names
histogram.summary: Classification of what gaia names appear or appeared in this profile since the last time gaia cookies got deleted. Thus, this also includes signed-out accounts. In order to protect privacy, only reports whether multiple distinct gaia names appeared in this profile and if so, whether sync is enabled for one of them. Furthermore, this metric uses a low-entropy hash to detect distinct names. In case of a rare hash collision (less than 0.1% of cases), multiple names get recorded as a single name. Recorded on every activation of a Chrome window (for the respective profile).

histogram.name: Profile.AndroidAccountManagementMenu
histogram.summary: Track user interactions that can be performed in the Android account management menu.

histogram.name: Profile.AppCount
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of installed apps when a profile is opened.

histogram.name: Profile.Avatar
histogram.summary: The frequency of selection of each avatar.

histogram.name: Profile.BookmarksSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the bookmarks database.

histogram.name: Profile.BrowserActive.PerProfile
histogram.summary:
Recorded every time a browser window becomes active. Each profile on a client is assigned a unique bucket, i.e. whenever a browser window of profile x becomes active, an entry is recorded in bucket x.
Example: A user has 2 profiles and opens 1 browser window for each of them. When the user switches back and forth between the windows, multiple entries will be recorded in bucket 1 and 2, corresponding to the profiles.
Note: The guest profile has bucket 0. Regular profiles start at bucket 1. Incognito browser windows count towards the original profile.

histogram.name: Profile.CookiesSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the cookies database.

histogram.name: Profile.CreateResult
histogram.summary: Result (final status) when creating a new profile.

histogram.name: Profile.CreateTimeNoTimeout
histogram.summary: Time elapsed from when the handler received the message that a user clicked 'Create' until the creation either failed with a local error (see Profile.CreateResult), was canceled (also recorded in Profile.CreateTimeCanceledNoTimeout), or completed successfully.

histogram.name: Profile.Delete
histogram.summary: This histogram tracks the deletion of the profile. This tracks when the cleanup actually takes place, not the UI interaction. The parameter indicates if the profile was signed in or not; true means the profile was signed in, false means the profile was not signed in.

histogram.name: Profile.DeleteProfileAction
histogram.summary: This histogram tracks which UI screen was used to initiate and confirm the deletion of a profile. This does not track when the profile is actually deleted, which is an asynchronous process that happens later. Not all buckets in the histogram correspond to profile deletion so the sum is not the count of deleted profiles.

histogram.name: Profile.DeleteProfileContext
histogram.summary: This histogram tracks the context of profile deletion whenever a profile is scheduled for deletion (from user action in the UI). Only recorded if the profile has a valid entry in ProfileAttributesStorage.

histogram.name: Profile.DiceUI.GaiaAccountsStale
histogram.summary: This histogram tracks whether the accounts cached in the GAIA cookie service manager are stale when presenting the user menu when DICE is enabled.

histogram.name: Profile.ExtensionSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the extension cookies database.

histogram.name: Profile.FaviconsSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the favicons database.

histogram.name: Profile.HistorySize
histogram.summary: Size of the history database.

histogram.name: Profile.Incognito.Lifetime
histogram.summary: This histogram records the lifetime duration of incognito profiles. It is recorded once an off the record profile for an incognito session is closed.

histogram.name: Profile.Menu.ClickedActionableItem
histogram.summary: Recorded when an actionable item(e.g. button, link) in the profile menu is clicked.

histogram.name: Profile.Menu.OpenedAfterAvatarAnimation
histogram.summary: When the profile menu is opened, after the identity animation was shown, this records the time since the animation was shown. In the control group for the identity pill experiment, this is still recorded as the time since the animation *would have been* shown.

histogram.name: Profile.Menu.OpenedAfterAvatarHighlight
histogram.summary: When the profile menu is opened, after the avatar was highlighted, this records the time since the highlight was shown.

histogram.name: Profile.NetUserCount
histogram.summary: Counts of users added and deleted. Percentages are not meaningful. Please look at the ratio of the counts/percentages.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfAccountsPerProfile
histogram.summary: Counts the number of Google-managed accounts linked to a profile. This may be counted multiple times per profile. Please review with the "Show user counts" option enabled on the dashboard.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfActiveProfiles
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of profiles on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
As opposed to Profile.NumberOfProfiles, this counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfManagedProfiles
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of locally managed profiles on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running, among cases with at least one profile.
This counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfNamedProfiles
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of profiles that have a user-defined name on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
This counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfProfiles
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of profiles on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
This counts the total number of profiles on the user's device, regardless of whether they've been used recently.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfProfilesAtProfileSwitch
histogram.summary: Records the count of profiles for each profile switch (incl. switching between concurrently open profiles by activating their browser windows). The count excludes the Guest profile so records in bucket 1 denote switches between the single profile and the Guest profile.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfProfilesWithAuthErrors
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of signed-in (syncing) profiles with GAIA authentication error on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
This counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfSignedInProfiles
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of signed-in (syncing) profiles on a user's machine every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
This counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfSignedInProfilesWithGAIAIcons
histogram.summary:
Counts the number of signed-in (syncing) profiles that are using the GAIA image as the avatar icon. Note that profiles with a GAIA image but without Sync consent are not counted. This is counted every 24 hours while Chrome is running.
This counts only profiles that have been used in the last 28 days.

histogram.name: Profile.NumberOfUnusedProfiles
histogram.summary: Counts the number of profiles unused within the past 28 days on a user's machine. This is recorded every 24 hours while Chrome is running.

histogram.name: Profile.PercentageOfManagedProfiles
histogram.summary: Tracks the percentage (0-100) of profiles that are locally managed, recorded when Chrome starts up.

histogram.name: Profile.ProfileError
histogram.summary: The error with the current user profile that caused an error dialog to be shown. This dialog is shown usually when there is some sort of corruption in the user's profile data.

histogram.name: Profile.SessionDuration.PerProfile
histogram.summary:
Browsing session duration in minutes, recorded per profile. Each profile on a client is assigned a unique bucket.
Recorded when the user switches profiles, after some time of inactivity(usually 5 minutes) or at browser shutdown.
Example: A user has 2 profiles. They open a browser window of profile 1 and interact with the browser for 8 minutes. Then they open a browser window of profile 2 and interact with the browser for 3 minutes. Then they do nothing (=stay inactive) for while. The recorded values will be: (bucket 1: 8), (bucket 2: 3).
Note: The guest profile has bucket 0. Regular profiles start at bucket 1. Incognito profiles count towards the original profile.

histogram.name: Profile.State.Avatar
histogram.summary: The state of profile avatars as would be displayed to the user in the profile picker. Recorded on startup of Chrome and whenever Chrome is used after at least 30 minutes of inactivity.

histogram.name: Profile.State.LastUsed
histogram.summary: The number of days since a profile was last used. Recorded on startup of Chrome and whenever Chrome is used after at least 30 minutes of inactivity.

histogram.name: Profile.State.Name
histogram.summary: The state of profile name as would be displayed to the user in the profile picker. Recorded on startup of Chrome and whenever Chrome is used after at least 30 minutes of inactivity.

histogram.name: Profile.State.SyncEnabled
histogram.summary: The sync status of the profile. Recorded on startup of Chrome and whenever Chrome is used after at least 30 minutes of inactivity.

histogram.name: Profile.State.UnconsentedPrimaryAccountType
histogram.summary: The type of profile's unconsented primary account. Recorded on startup of Chrome and whenever Chrome is used after at least 30 minutes of inactivity.

histogram.name: Profile.SwitchGaiaPhotoSettings
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Counts of when users switch to using their GAIA photo instead of an avatar icon or the opposite when they switch back to an avatar icon instead of their GAIA photo.

histogram.name: Profile.SyncCustomize
histogram.summary: Number of times and ways the user customized the sync options of their profile. Percentages are not meaningful. To determine percentages, take the count of a given action over the count of number of customizations. The histogram has expired in '2018-08-30' and is resurrected in '2020-03-09'.

histogram.name: Profile.TimeToOpenUserManagerUpTo1min
histogram.summary: Time required to open the UserManager, from when it started to show until when its javascript started executing.

histogram.name: Profile.TopSitesSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the top sites database.

histogram.name: Profile.TotalHistorySize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Total size of all history databases.

histogram.name: Profile.TotalSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Total size of the profile data (excluding sub-folders).

histogram.name: Profile.TriggeredReset
histogram.summary: Indicates whether a profile had a reset trigger that caused it to launch a reset flow. The presence of this trigger is recorded during profile creation.

histogram.name: Profile.Update
histogram.summary: Recorded when a profile name and/or avatar was updated from the settings page.

histogram.name: Profile.UserAction.PerProfile
histogram.summary:
Helper histogram to track user actions per profile. Recorded when there is an active profile browser instance and a UMA UserAction is recorded, i.e. if there's an active profile, a recording of a UMA UserAction will result in a recording of a sample in this histogram.
Each profile on a client is assigned a unique bucket, i.e. whenever a user action happens in a browser of profile x, an entry is recorded in bucket x.
Example: A user has 2 profiles and opens a browser window for each of them. When the user adds a new tab in each of the browsers, an entry is recorded in bucket 1 and 2, corresponding to the profiles. (Adding a new tab is a recorded user metrics action.)
Note: The guest profile has bucket 0. Regular profiles start at bucket 1. Incognito profiles count towards the original profile.

histogram.name: Profile.ValidateMenuItemInvalidIndex.IsGuest
histogram.summary: Whether the active profile is a guest profile when -validateMenuItem in the ProfileMenuController gets an invalid value for the current profile's index.

histogram.name: Profile.ValidateMenuItemInvalidIndex.ProfileCount
histogram.summary: The count of profiles in the avatar menu when -validateMenuItem in the ProfileMenuController gets an invalid value for the current profile's index.

histogram.name: Profile.ValidateMenuItemInvalidIndex.Selector
histogram.summary: The selector associated with the menu item when -validateMenuItem in the ProfileMenuController gets an invalid value for the current profile's index.

histogram.name: Profile.VisitedLinksSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the visited links database.

histogram.name: Profile.WebDataSize
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Size of the web data database.

histogram.name: ProfileChooser.HasProfilesShown
histogram.summary: Whether any profile was shown in the list when the profile chooser was opened.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.AskOnStartup
histogram.summary: Records the state of the "Ask on startup" user preference that controls whether the profile picker should be shown on startup. Recorded on startup of Chrome.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.AskOnStartupChanged
histogram.summary: Records the state of the "Ask on startup" checkbox upon user action to check/uncheck "Ask on startup" in the profile picker main screen.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.NewProfileCreateShortcut
histogram.summary: Whether the user picked to create a desktop shortcut for the new profile created through the local profile creation in the profile picker. Recorded on platforms where desktop shortcut is enabled.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.NewProfileTheme
histogram.summary: Records the theme color of a new profile just created through the profile picker local profile creation.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.Shown
histogram.summary: Records the reason why the profile picker has been shown to the user. Recorded every time the profile picker window is shown or reactivated.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.StartupTime.BeforeCreation
histogram.summary: Records the time between Chrome startup and the call to ProfilePickerView::Display(). Only recorded when the profile picker is shown at startup.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.StartupTime.FirstPaint
histogram.summary: Records the time between web view creation and the first paint. Only recorded when the profile picker is shown at startup.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.StartupTime.MainViewInitialized
histogram.summary: Records the time between web view creation and main view being initialized in javascript. Only recorded when the profile picker is shown at startup.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.StartupTime.WebViewCreated
histogram.summary: Records the time between ProfilePickerView::Display() is called and the web view creation. Only recorded when the profile picker is shown at startup.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.UiVisited
histogram.summary: Represents user navigation in the profile picker. Recorded every time a different UI is visible in the profile picker.

histogram.name: ProfilePicker.UserAction
histogram.summary: Records the action performed by the user in the profile picker.

histogram.name: ProfileReset.ResetRequestOrigin
histogram.summary: Encodes from where the request for resetting the profile settings originated.
